posts.author: YashGarg (Yash Garg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Team,

I submitted monetisation plans for my app which is in review. Soon it will be about 1 week since I submitted the form, but I haven’t got any revert yet. I am stuck only on monetisation now for my app approval process. Can I get an update about it, the app id is 10130616.

Thanks
Yash Garg

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @YashGarg!

I have sent a message to the marketplace team so that they can contact you

Cheers,
Matias
